functions.name: escapeSlackMrkdwn
functions.docstring: Escape special characters for Slack mrkdwn format. @see https://api.slack.com/reference/surfaces/formatting#escaping

functions.name: escapeSlackUrl
functions.docstring: Escape a URL for use in Slack mrkdwn link format.

functions.docstring: Truncate text to max length with ellipsis.

functions.name: maskUrlForLogging
functions.docstring: Mask a URL for safe logging.

functions.name: buildSlackPayload
functions.docstring: Build Slack message payload with Block Kit formatting.
